blended.narrative: Mt. Baker is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,899 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 6.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 23" over the past week. Current depth: 48".
